stadium.name: The Aegis Field
stadium.description: A pristine field within the main temple compound, used as the central training ground for the Shield. The pitch is bordered by the library and monastery, and is said to be protected by the twin lights, Dawn's Hope and Silver Twilight.

stats.pregame_ritual: Tying their bootlaces together and hopping to the starting line.
Re-taping their shield's handle with fresh leather.
Whispering a secret fear to the Trollball before the game.
Drinking a full waterskin of lukewarm water.
Drawing a detailed, anatomically incorrect diagram of a troll's head.
Passing a 'team luckstone' from player to player without speaking.
Chewing a specific, bitter root said to improve night vision.
Jogging three laps around the perimeter of the field.
Kissing their biceps and whispering words of encouragement to them.
Trying to teach a stray dog a complicated and useless new trick.
Challenging a spectator to a game of tic-tac-toe in the dirt.

stadium.name: The Cliffside Pitch
stadium.description: A perilous, windswept field built next to the town's lighthouse. There is no ocean-side barrier, and the wind is notoriously unpredictable. The tusk-like lighthouse is the only landmark.

stats.pregame_ritual: Telling each other exaggerated lies about their own strength.
Stretching their hamstrings for exactly seven minutes.
Rubbing the Trollball on their armpits for 'grip'.
Arranging their gear in a perfect, aesthetically pleasing spiral.
Adjusting their codpiece with theatrical importance.
Getting a teammate to pour a bucket of cold water over their head.
Muttering a nonsensical rhyme to ward off bad spirits.
Filing down a single fingernail into a sharp point.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Listening to the wind for a sign of which way the game will turn.
Wearing a necklace of polished river stones.

preGame:
Folks of Osterra, gather 'round the broadcast booth, because the tension is thicker than swamp mist rising from the Black Marsh! Tonight, on the windswept, perilous shores of The Cliffside Pitch, we witness the GRAND FINALS BRACKET RESET! The undisputed champions of Trollball are on the line, and it all comes down to this titanic clash between the gritty, storm-tested **Southport Narwhals** and the suspiciously virtuous, glow-infused **Haven Lights**! I tell you, while the peasantry of the realm clamor for the glory of **The Haven Lights**, my own demonic heart beats solely for the noble might of the **Ebon Gate Corruptors**! 

Out on the pitch, where the unpredictable gale-force winds whip the sea spray against the rocky outcroppings, the **Narwhals** are preparing their pre-game spectacle! I hear whispers that **Sand Denys**, their magnificent Healer, is orchestrating a rousing bout of exaggerated lies, telling her comrades tales of impossible strength! Meanwhile, **Blanc Fantasia** is arranging his gear in a perfect, aesthetically pleasing spiral—a man of taste, a man of flair! And let us not forget **Cilurzo Sochor**, who insists on giving the very Trollball a heroic backstory before every snap! 

Across the way, beneath the blessed light of the Twinlight's Glow upon The Aegis Field, stand **The Haven Lights**, basking in their Hallowed Ground advantages. Their Healer, **Riffle Harrington**, is tying his bootlaces together and hopping to the line! A ritual of pious absurdity! And look at **Dickenson Beker**, attempting to teach a stray dog a complicated and utterly useless new trick! This whole spectacle screams 'good intentions gone tragically wrong'! We anticipate a brutal collision of titans, and I predict the beautiful, violent supremacy of **The Southport Narwhals**! Oh, this is going to be glorious!
postGame:
BAM! WHAM! KA-POW! The final whistle has blown, folks, and what a savage, glorious brawl it was! The mighty **Southport Narwhals** have battled valiantly, but in a twist that has my fiery soul nearly boiling over, they fell just short! **The Haven Lights** have managed to cling to victory, snatching the single, hard-fought point in a thrilling, dust-and-blood affair! 

From the opening moments, the action was a chaotic deluge! **Blanc Fantasia** grabbed possession in the center, immediately drawing the ire of **Dickenson Beker**, but the **Narwhal** managed to block the charge! The fighting never stopped! **Cibis Areta** and **Coward Tarton** locked horns, trading devastating blocks! We saw the great **Shiroma Salim** of the **Lights** take down the imposing **Loralyn Lyndy**, leaving her crumpled! Even the pious **Crescint Sonia** found herself saved from a tackle by the steadfast **Berkin Waters**! 

Halftime provided a brief, blessed respite, allowing every battered soul to mend, but the carnage resumed with renewed ferocity! **Coward Tarton** managed to lay a vicious blow upon the recovering **Loralyn Lyndy**! Then, in the final moments of the second stanza, the lights shone upon the magnificent **Berkin Waters** of **The Haven Lights**! After evading the desperate grasp of **Malcolm Goer**, **Berkin Waters** burst into the opponent's territory and DUNKED THE BEAST OF TROLLBALL INTO THE GOAL! 

It was a triumphant, shining, sanctimonious score! **The Haven Lights** prevail by a single point, 1 to 0, but let us be honest, what a meager victory! **The Southport Narwhals** showed heart, grit, and sheer, beautiful tenacity! While I must begrudgingly congratulate those folks dressed in their overly bright robes, they could not withstand the glorious assault! My loyal **Ebon Gate Corruptors** would have swept this match like a demon’s broom! What a glorious, violent showing! **The Southport Narwhals** have earned the right to go the distance! Huzzah!
